mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(write_year, '-', doc_type, '-', doc_no) AS id, plan_nm AS name, created_at FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC

WITH reduction AS ( SELECT r.write_year, r.doc_type, r.doc_no, r.doc_seq, r.doc_seq_detail, p.plan_nm AS plan_name, r.reduction_measures, r.impl_content, r.expected_date, r.completed_date, r.after_risk_score, r.created_at FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction r LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan p ON p.write_year = r.write_year AND p.doc_type = r.doc_type AND p.doc_no = r.doc_no AND p.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND p.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE r.use_yn = 'Y' AND r.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND r.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND r.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND r.doc_seq = #{docSeq} -- :doc_seq AND r.doc_seq_detail = #{docSeqDetail} -- :doc_seq_detail LIMIT 1 ), assignees AS ( SELECT r.write_year, r.doc_type, r.doc_no, r.doc_seq, r.doc_seq_detail, json_agg( json_build_object( 'hrId', rh.hr_id, 'name', h.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', jbrp.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', o.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', f.file_id ) ) AS assignees FROM reduction r LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction_hr rh ON rh.write_year = r.write_year AND rh.doc_type = r.doc_type AND rh.doc_no = r.doc_no AND rh.doc_seq = r.doc_seq AND rh.doc_seq_detail = r.doc_seq_detail LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info h ON rh.hr_id = h.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = h.hr_id AND f.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info o ON h.orgn_id = o.orgn_id AND o.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND o.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = h.jbrp AND jbrp.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE rh.hr_id IS NOT NULL AND rh.hr_id != '' GROUP BY r.write_year, r.doc_type, r.doc_no, r.doc_seq, r.doc_seq_detail ), implementation AS ( SELECT i.hazards_type, type.minor_nm AS type_name, i.hazards_classification, classification.minor_nm AS classification_name, i.process_id, -- 공정 ID pi.process_nm AS process_name, -- 공정명 i.prcs_work_id AS work_id, -- 작업 ID w.work_content AS work_name, -- 작업명 i.hazards_factor, -- 유해위험요인 내용 i.hazards_cause, -- 원인 i.related_evidence, -- 관련 근거 i.risk_score -- 현재 위험성 점수 FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation i RIGHT JOIN reduction r ON i.write_year = r.write_year AND i.doc_type = r.doc_type AND i.doc_no = r.doc_no AND i.doc_seq = r.doc_seq AND i.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_info pi ON pi.process_id = i.process_id AND pi.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id /* AND pi.use_yn = 'Y' */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work w ON w.prcs_work_id = i.prcs_work_id /* AND w.use_yn = 'Y' */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d type ON i.hazards_type = type.minor_cd AND type.major_cd = 'C0022' /* AND type.use_yn = 'Y' */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d classification ON classification.major_cd = i.hazards_type AND classification.minor_cd = i.hazards_classification /* AND classification.use_yn = 'Y' */
), before_files AS ( SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'fileId', file_id, 'fileName', file_nm, 'fileExt', extension, 'fileType', file_type, 'fileSize', file_size ) ) AS file_arr FROM esg.tb_sys_file WHERE target_type = 'RAP' AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{docSeqDetail}, 'B') -- :write_year, :doc_no, :doc_seq, :doc_seq_detail AND use_yn = 'Y' ), after_files AS ( SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'fileId', file_id, 'fileName', file_nm, 'fileExt', extension, 'fileType', file_type, 'fileSize', file_size ) ) AS file_arr FROM esg.tb_sys_file WHERE target_type = 'RAP' AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{docSeqDetail}, 'A') -- :write_year, :doc_no, :doc_seq, :doc_seq_detail AND use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT CONCAT(r.write_year, '-', r.doc_type, '-', r.doc_no, '-', r.doc_seq, '-', r.doc_seq_detail) AS id, r.reduction_measures AS content, a.assignees, i.risk_score AS beforeRiskLevel, r.after_risk_score AS afterRiskLevel, json_build_object( 'id', CONCAT(r.write_year, '-', r.doc_type, '-', r.doc_no, '-', r.doc_seq), 'cause', i.hazards_cause, 'content', i.hazards_factor, 'relatedEvidence', i.related_evidence, 'riskLevel', i.risk_score, 'classification', i.classification_name, 'type', i.type_name ) AS hazardFactor, json_build_object( 'id', CONCAT(r.write_year, '-', r.doc_type, '-', r.doc_no), 'name', r.plan_name ) AS riskAssessment, json_build_object( 'id', i.process_id, 'name', i.process_name ) AS process, json_build_object( 'id', i.work_id, 'name', i.work_name ) AS work, r.impl_content AS implementation, COALESCE(bf.file_arr, '[]'::json) AS beforeFiles, COALESCE(af.file_arr, '[]'::json) AS afterFiles, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.expected_date, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(r.expected_date, 'yyyyMMdd')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS expectedAt, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.completed_date, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(r.completed_date, 'yyyyMMdd')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS completedAt, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reduction r LEFT JOIN assignees a ON TRUE LEFT JOIN implementation i ON TRUE LEFT JOIN before_files bf ON TRUE LEFT JOIN after_files af ON TRUE
